reviews.review_description: This is more than your average jump scare horror games. By  far the best I've played thus far and I've played many horror games. I got it on sale for 0.99,but its very much worth the asking price. So if you're the type who loves horror games I suggest you give this a try. It's definitely an experience. Great game!

At first, I absolutely loved the game and navigating through the mansion and the tasks. Then, I had the "make it through the garden" task. Its nearly impossible. The wraith can spot you no matter how slow you move or hide. I dont want to spend 30 minutes hiding from her, then right when I get to unlock the doors, here she comes and I have to start all over. No thanks. There are no objects laying around for you to grab to distract her. 
I've watched YouTube videos on how to beat and nothing works. So, im done with it. Fix the game where you can pick up objects to distract her.

Currently in the garden you get softlocked completely, ive tried it multiple times but you cannot burn the rot before your flashlight runs out pathos resulting in a softlock, I cannot recommend getting this in this state

reviews.review_title: DON'T LISTEN TO THE CRY BABIES!
reviews.review_description:
Ignore the COD cry babies who need a gun in every game in order to feel safe. No idea what previous reviewer is talking about in the garden. It literally takes a few minutes to progress - if you are smart. 

This game is genuinely terrifying at points, its the vulnerability that causes serious dread in the dark corners of the mansion where things may or may not be lurking. 

If you have a problem with horror games DO NOT PLAY THIS....unless you have an extra pair of underwear on standby. 
Fantastic mature storyline, mechanics and graphics are solid. Sound design is also incredible. Bravo to these guys. 

It's as entertaining and engaging as 7th Guest, The Room etc although very few puzzle elements, rather its a discovery and unravelling of a terrifying mystery and you are the main character. 

At only 99p! It's ridiculously generous, no doubt discounted because of the kids who can't see beyond shooting a gun for entertainment and reviewing it negatively because of it. 

BUY IT NOW. Easy 5 stars. 

But BEWARE. I'ts the most unsettling game I've played in VR and I've played 95% of the survival horror games.....Good luck

reviews.review_title: Garden wraith ruins the game early on
reviews.review_description:
Despite some minor flaws, I was enjoying the game until about 1/3 of the through when I made it to the wraith in the garden.  That level has effectively killed all my enjoyment and interest in this game.  Basically, you’re forced to spend 15-20 minutes hiding from a wraith by moving behind various walls while navigating through a garden.  Until it sees you, the wraith moves and turns INCREDIBLY SLOWLY so every attempt on this level seems to take forever.  
Once the wraith sees you, you're immediately killed and have to start the level over.  Now you would think, considering you are at such a huge disadvantage in this level, that the wraith would take a couple seconds to see you: nope, the wraith can spot you instantly (and often does).  Even after all that, if you manage to successfully make it through the garden the wraith will blast open all the doors to the (cabana?) room you just escaped into and then kills you anyway.  There is no way to fight back or to hide again once you’ve been seen.
I cannot express how much I HATE when game developers do this.  These prolonged “move slowly or be killed instantly” levels were bad enough in games for console systems, but they are so much worse in VR.  Does anyone out there think it sounds fun to tightly strap a VR headset to your face and then spend an hour or more playing through a single level that would take 2 minutes if not for the ridiculous handicaps the developers threw in against you?  I certainly didn't.  
If the developers ever decide to release an update for this level, I will absolutely be willing to try again.  The game was pretty good up to this point, but not good enough to justify this much frustration this early on.

reviews.review_title: what is the point of the game???
reviews.review_description: They say it's a horror game, but this isn't a horror game except that they tried to convey something scary through the sound. Turn down the sound and you have Super Mario wandering around the house like he drank two bottles of whiskey and has hallucinations of some guys who have so much money that they don't know what to do with themselves. In short, avoid it unless you got the game for free or paid a few dollars for it.

reviews.review_title: Great setting ruined by painful gameplay
reviews.review_description:
I really wanted to enjoy this. In fact I did until I got to the office part where you have to hide from the tall wraith. That part was clearly never play tested, because no matter how slowly I walked, he would just spawn behind me, and kill me instantly.

He was also in the way of progression most times, with no clear way how to lure him out of the way so I can progress. Mostly linear corridors exacerbated this issue.

You can't outrun him. Even the flash is completely useless, he is neutralized for so little that you wont even have time to escape by sprinting (as you sprint really slow). What is even the point of that?

Immersion factor, the setting and the story really work, but the extremely punishing gameplay ruins all of that.

Both play though I made bugged out after I was killed in the garden, spawns me back where you enter the house initially, and it sucks cause I really wanted to like this game, had a cool aspect and features to it, but how can I enjoy it if I can’t even get past one of the early on enemies.

reviews.review_title: Oblivion is a 5 year old hidden gem!
reviews.review_description:
IIf you’re reading this just buy it! Right now it’s 99 cents.  And it will be the best 99 cents you have ever spent!  If you miss the sale it’s still worth it! 

The game itself starts you off not knowing what you are doing but unlike the other reviewers  complaint of this, that’s the whole point of the game. It’s telling you a story as you progress.  This isn’t a game to pick up and run through, you have to dive into the story and let it guide you. 

The game goes from simple to creepy to morbid  to terror and an anxiety level of horror that you’ll say nope and throw your headset across the room! 

Simply embrace the story and the horror and you’re going to have a good time!

Trust me, this is a game you WANT to play through not knowing anything! 

update: 

Now that I have played through the game. Heres some tips that does not spoil the surprises! Do not look up the walkthroughs! Let it be a surprise!

The game is telling a story, you need to follow the objectives.  The main and actually the only gotcha  what appears to be a glitch but it’s not is when your asked to burn something in a fireplace.  Not spoiling anything but there is an order to follow. Put item in fireplace THEN find the gas key and turn on the fireplace.  If you do the opposite the game will lock you in with something you will not want to be with. 


A huge tip I found very useful is when traveling, close every single door you open. KEEP ALL the doors closed at all times. The “somethings” will stay on their places for the most part. IF they hear you, they  will look for you! 

And so you know there are two endings based on the things you collect in the game. All wins the game, anything less is lose!
Garbage

At the part in the garden after I died once it teleports me to entrance of mansion where I cannot move and no buttons work, i uninstalled and reinstalled the game 3 times and it still loads me to game breaking bug. 😡
Please buy this game. I literally only played it for like 20 minutes and was already too scared and had to take a break lol

Fast Travel Games are excellent developers and the game starts off interesting but as soon as I had to get past a wraith by waiting for it to hobble around I stopped playing. Its such a tired mechanic and just waiting for ages for it to move out of the way is, for me, is just tedious. I remember the same thing 30 years ago with the first splinter cell game. Hated the game play then too! It probably wouldn’t be so bad if the running speed was faster than walking, but its almost the same. If crouching made you less visible but it make no difference  - I will leave it there.
This is a intresting horror puzzle game the puzzles are really fun and the game gets creepy very fast like chapter after chapter its an great game tbh and i recommend it so go try it out.
Just bought this over the weekend definitely 4.5 stars. I know it was out for awhile but good game. Nice scare scenes overall gameplay is good. Well worth it

First of all, I want to clarify that I’m a player who has completed the game 100%, and I haven’t been paid to give it a good rating.
Secondly, if by any chance you’re reading my comment, please don’t pay attention to the negative reviews — they’re from people with two brain cells that aren’t even enough to add 1+1. These are people who rate the game poorly because they discover at the end that you can hide, who don’t know you can distract enemies by throwing objects, or who give it one star just because they can’t skip the dialogues.

The game is incredible. It immerses you in a dark atmosphere, has immersive sound, and a story full of twists and amazing moments. You have to be patient, uncover the story little by little, and start connecting the dots. The game leaves you defenseless in an Amnesia-style way, and your character is deliberately slow so you feel the horror in your own skin. It’s true that the graphics aren’t five-star quality, but it really doesn’t need them. Give it a chance — it’s a fantastic game that’s been unfairly criticized.

It is a nonlinear stealth / puzzle game with a horror background, a beautiful thriller story and done very well, with a fairly good graphics. Not recommended to lovers of "shoot shoots to zombies" but recommended to those who love suspense and dive, equipped with a lot of patience and cold blood. Although known of distant similarities with the beautiful Fatal Frame, it is equipped with a character of his own. I liked it a lot. 10€  spent well.

Thank you!
A perfect game for virtual reality. 
You feel your environment and the story is at the heart of the action! Need a new installment !!
I was supposed to use the senses to find the voice in my head. I was expecting more feedback from those senses - I wandered around for 20 minutes finding nothing. I got bored and gave up.
It's unclear what you actually have to do and why you die.

I was skeptical at first to try this game out, but I'm glad I did. Each room has an ethereal and darkly chilling feel as you must figure each segment of the Mansion and its grounds to solve the mystery behind the seance while trying to avoid being consumed by the spirits that lurk in the Afterlife. I spent hours playing this eerily good game.

reviews.review_title: Didn't realize it's a hiding game
reviews.review_description: Yeah, you have to hide

Used all 3 game saves (which won’t delete, by the way) getting soft-locked in the garden. The flash bulb runs out every time trying to burn the roots needed to progress (flashing red), and the photograph to refill the pathos doesn’t respawn. Can’t progress.  

This happens every single time in the garden.  

Worse, I think, is the movement speed. Nothing but frustration with every step. The ‘sprint’ speed should be the walking speed. The actual walking speed is literally a snail’s pace. It’s excruciating.  

I like the aesthetic, though the textures are janky and the characters models are kinda bad. There was some good atmosphere, but it got repetitive fast, and wasn’t very  scary.

I highly recommend this game. As someone who loves story-driven games, I had a great time playing it. However, there were a few issues that bothered me. The walking and sprinting controls were inconsistent; sometimes the character would just stop walking for a few seconds, and sprinting often did not work as expected—I would end up stopping instead of sprinting. I also found it frustrating that I couldn't push a door open unless I was touching the handle. The stealth mechanics can be quite challenging too, as you often have to hide without moving for several minutes. Despite these drawbacks, it is still a great game, and considering its age, many of these issues can be excused in terms of VR gameplay.
I bought this cause I enjoyed their other game. This just isn’t fast enough for me. Too slow paced and boring.

Atmosphere - superb. Story and twists - seems to be going in the good directions. Graphics - fine. Vr immersion - fine.

Now the bad parts... enemies and the fact that you're not a wraith. You're some weak useless casper at best. Cant fight, barely can move anything, I think u even get damage when voing through wall. Movement speed is terrible... casper is probably more menacing then yourself... and first 5 chapters its annoying, but objectives are doable. However after you need to get 3 items to get into what Im guessing either final cutscene or final chapter - you start to encounter 2 specters per location... and because casper is stronger then yourself, go into seated mode, grab tea and watch how ai will stumble and infinitely gonna be monitoring area where objective is rendering getting it impossible rendering game finisheable only on youtube.

Buyer for god sake beware and chek if reviewers actually finished the game or not...

This game would definitely get a 5 star rating from me if only the game wasn’t so dam dark. Why is it that when watching someone on you tube play the whole game it’s light and they can see everything but when I play it personally it’s so dark that I can’t see anything, like why make it so dark that you can’t even see door knobs to open doors?  This game is so frustrating. I feel like I’m blind in there so  I spend 1/2 hour or so just looking for the door  knob?  It really ticks me off because I don’t understand it ? Why make it so  freaking dark?

Who do i talk to for a refund? Grab barely works. Cant even save my game, let alone continue with the quest! Picked up a couple rocks with lots of effort. Other than that, grab is useless. Wish i could play...

Fantastic game, at first confusing but once out the house really good, lots of perseverance needed but it’s worth it, scary at times and really atmospheric plus no motion sickness I need more games like this.

I was looking forward to playing this, but I've given up after the beginning section, mainly because the movement options are abysmal! You have a choice of smooth walking or watching your feet walk off and you teleport to where you stop the pointer.  What this means is that you can end up standing next to a spectre, slowly dying, while having to walk the pointer to a safe distance to move to. It's like being punished for getting motion sickness! If there was a standard teleport option it would be much less irritating and I might get to play it, but for now I can't play it.
Haven't been playing VR very long but I have to say it keeps you on the edge of your seat definitely thrilling one of the best I've played yet for sure
Graphics are pretty nice but not nice enough to make up for how boring it is
Too slow, not scary and if you want poor graphics make sure you purchase it on the quest.
I didn’t enjoy this at all. I really want my money back.

reviews.review_title: This game is the perfect horror game
reviews.review_description: Me and my wife just bought the quest 2, about a month ago this was the first game we bought as far as horror games go. Let me just say my wife and I are in our mid-thirties and this game was creepy as can be the jump scares were perfect you had to sneak around the monsters and the enemies it had a story to it honestly it was absolutely perfect I don't think we're going to find another game quite like it ever again for the money this has got to be the best game we've ever played. Now granite this is the first game we ever bought but now we have very high expectations.

developer_response.body: Hey Sharvin! Thank you very much for the amazing review! Horror and VR go so well together and we are super pleased you and your wife enjoyed it together.

reviews.review_description: I swear this is legit the scariest game I’ve played. At some points I had to take a break because I legit had goosebumps. Definitely recommended for horror fans!!!! Wish there was a 2nd game to this because I have now beat the game.

developer_response.body: We're so happy to hear you enjoyed your stay at the Barclay Mansion, thanks for the 5 star review!

reviews.review_description: Help.  I am new at gaming and. I can not figure out how to get passed the first part where the gate and the chair are.   .

developer_response.body: Hi Ameyhkelley, if you walk towards the gate a remnant will appear and talk. You will then be teleported to the other side of the gate. Please send us an email over at support@fasttravelgames.com if you are still struggling/update your review with how you get on!

reviews.review_description: It won’t install

developer_response.body:
Hi casperBreaux, we have tested & we are able to install the application. We recommend reaching out to Oculus (now Meta) to receive assistance on this.

We hope once you have done so that you take the time to update your review as this does not reflect correctly on the game :-)

reviews.review_description:
I purchased this game after I read the reviews and while I was looking for a horror game. I must say, this does indeed earn 5 stars. The graphics are great, story-telling is reminiscent of when games ACTUALLY had substance, and the sound design is so immersive. This game is honestly bone chilling. There are times where I’ll put on my headset to play, and then I remember I’m on a really creepy mission and then I take the Oculus off 😂 I am a huge sucker for scares and have a very high tolerance for being spooked, but this game genuinely gets me frightened. I love it! 

Only downfall is the saves. I wish we could toggle manual saving to avoid having to restart from quite a period ago and also to play the game for a short period without having to go find another save. 

All in all, incredible game. 10/10 for scare factor.

developer_response.body:
This review has warmed our heart! We're really over the moon to hear how much you've enjoyed playing & how the game truly frightened you!

While we cannot change the save system for this game, we will keep this in mind for any future titles we develop! :-)

reviews.review_description: I love this game and have just completed it, but feel like it should have come with some kind of warning about the graphic suicide scenes. Two close family members of mine committed suicide when I was young so needless to say these scenes weren't scary, but disturbing and somewhat PTSD inducing. As I said though, it is an amazing game so I still played through it, but just a little thing that says "this game contains scenes of suicide" or something would have been appreciated and may also be appreciated by others, so just putting a warning out there.

developer_response.body:
Hi! 

This is definitely something we should have, we'll look into it as soon as possible. Thanks for bringing it to our attention and sorry you had to go through these scenes without a warning.

reviews.review_description: Finally, an exceptional World of Darkness game. For those who may be unaware, Wraith: The Oblivion started as a table-top R.P.G. It is part of a larger lore universe, which includes Vampire: The Masquerade and Werewolf: The Apocalypse. These games are known collectively as the World of Darkness. The table-top games are very fun, but any type of video game based on them is extremely rare. And a good video game based on them is even more rare, so it is refreshing to see Wraith brought into a digital format in such a serious and fun way. I am about an hour into the game and although I do have very minor complaints, these are not game breaking or hard to overcome. First the pros- a solid story that is actually scary, atmosphere, music and sound design, gameplay... kinda, let me explain. As far as gameplay goes, the sprint feature could be much faster and your Wraith powers and items could use a little bit better of an explanation of how to use them. However, neither of these things takes much time to figure out trial and error wise and in no time you will figure out how each power and item works. The only other gameplay issue I have is that the mystery is not too hard to unravel, clues are easy to find and a clever person could probably piece together what happened at Barclay Mansion, as I think I already have, but we shall see if I am right when I finish the game. Now for the cons- there isn't much, except for what I mentioned earlier such as the sprint feature and the easy to find clues, therefore not a huge challenge. The only other con to the game is a personal rather nitpicky one for me, in that certain lore mechanics from the table-top game are present in the V.R., but not well explained. This can possibly confuse players who are not aware of the table-top R.P.G. or its obscure terminology. For example early in the game you pick up a photograph which tells you that it replenishes your "Corpus", which is basically a term for a Wraiths health meter and it's never explained. Therefore, if a player doesn't know what that means, then they won't know how to replenish their health when they take damage. Also items and abilities sometimes run off a unique Wraith energy called "Pathos", and again this isn't explained well at all. Also, another ghost like entity known as your "Shadow" follows you throughout the game, but so far he hasn't been reffered to as your "Shadow", nor is it explained why he exists or what he does. The "Shadow", or a Wraith's dark half, is the definitive gameplay mechanic of the Wraith: The Oblivion table-top R.P.G. and if new players of the V.R. game don't know this then the "Shadow" that follows you in this game could be very confusing. However, I have still given this game five stars because, none of the issues I have are major ones. And most of the gameplay mechanic issues can be overcome with a little patience and some trial and  error. The lore issues I have however could have been implemented a bit better, but still can be figured out and if you get lost try a friend who knows Wraith or Google. The issues I have about the "Shadow" I am confident will more than likely be explained later in the game. All in all, this game is a scary, much needed, and long overdue entry into the World of Darkness.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for posting a review! We are very proud and humble to the be the first studio in the world to make a video game based on Wraith: The Oblivion, so it means a lot to read feedback like this!

reviews.review_description:
....to write a review? 

The first half hour was a little lackluster, spent most of it looking for scenery that hadn't been glued together properly, didn't find any...the environment in Afterlife is smooth, detailed and convincing. A very solid looking World so far.

I wasn't in the mood for long bouts of tutorials disguised as story so I day dreamed through that first half hour.....whilst being visually impressive and providing a credible hands on experience, it hadn't gripped me......

Then they took the stabilisers off and unleashed the Afterlife on me....it got very twitchy very quickly, largely due to the superbly crafted soundtrack, audio effects and general sound of the building. I think I scared myself more than the game scared me and that is the killer blow of any  horror on any format.

So far so good, Afterlife is a solid adventure

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts so far, we look forward to seeing an updated review the further you progress! The first part of the game is deliberately a bit slower to establish the background story and the atmosphere, further in you get both Wraith Powers and Inventory with different items to play with. We tried to focus heavily on psychological horror in Afterlife, sounds like it is working as intended! Good luck with the remainder of your stay in the Barclay Mansion 👻

reviews.review_description: I had a blast playing this game. Jump scares are very scarce and thats good. I liked the dread dripping atmosphere and the story. Length is decent and grafic is one of the best of all available quest store games. Must buy for people who like scary story driven games. Thanks to the devs for this awesome gem of a game :). Looking forward for your next game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the the kind words! We're happy to hear you enjoyed your time in the Barclay Mansion :-)

reviews.review_description: Ok I played a lot of horror video games in my life. From playing them on video game system and now 2 VR. And this 1 takes the cake. The graphics are gorgeous the store so far is fantastic. The game play and the ability’s in the game are fantastic. 1 of the fantastic horror VR games I have ever played.  If you guys make a sequel 2 this or add on 2 it I will buy it big time. This was so worth $30. The only thing that could use a little touch up is the sound. Not much tho just a little bit. But still gets 5/5 stars hands down.

developer_response.body: Amazing to read this, thank you so much for taking the time to share your impressions! Hope you get a 100% completion rate!

reviews.review_description:
I have played this game for 3 weeks now and it is breathtaking it is so realistic that its just ridiculous the graphics are amazing it is like you are actually there 😅 brilliant game devs great horror storyline brilliant detail in the mansion and soundtrack is good really builds up the mood 

Overall thanks devs for bringing an amazing realistic game on the quest 2 👍☝😀😀

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this awesome review! We're overjoyed to hear how much you're loving the game so far. Feel free to join our discord if you'd like to come hang out! https://www.discord.gg/fasttravelgames

reviews.review_title: NOPE, STILL HATE IT IT'S HORRIBLE
reviews.review_description: I got past the part I was stuck on for 2 months just to get messed up on another part and I think this game is the worst game on Oculus I think it shouldn't be allowed and I think the developers need to find another career path.

developer_response.body: Hey Dravey, sad to hear you hate the game. Nevertheless we appreciate all of our players feedback whether postive or negative! We'd love to help you further with where you are stuck at, feel free to email us at support@fasttravelgames.com!

reviews.review_description:
Only played the intro really but the reason it's a little startling is the house looks just like one I used to have in a reoccurring dream as a kid 😂
Graphics are amazing seconded only by the sound effects (need to play with headphones for the full effect)
A lot of attention to detail from what I have seen so far tottaly worth the price 🤘🏻
Only downside I noticed was it did start to cause motion sickness, never had this in vr before but there are tons of comfort options that I have yet to fiddle with so doubt it will be an issue

developer_response.body: This mansion will be more like a nightmare than a dream 👻! We really appreciate you taking the time to leave a review! We recommend putting the comfort options to max and then lowering them depending on how you feel 🙂

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. The atmosphere is everything you could want in a horror game. However it does have a few glitches and I've found one game breaking bug so far. I saved after using the gas key and now can no longer interact with it. Meaning I can no longer progress. after putting in around 7 hours it feels like a shame to have to start all over. Overall great game just don't do what i did.

developer_response.body:
Hey Darkhalf! Thanks for leaving a review, we're thrilled you're enjoying the game so far!

We are aware of this bug and we've implemented a fix for the next patch. In the meantime here is a work around: head back to the Atrium and grab Cassandra's Contract, carry this back to the office and then place it directly inside of the fireplace, after this press the red button.

If you have any issues with this please email us over at support@fasttravelgames.com!

reviews.review_description: After consulting with the developers they were working on the problem you just return to the Antrim onthe table and carry the contract back to the fireplace and carry  on😄😄😄

developer_response.body: Hey Roger, thanks for taking the time to leave a review. Please send us an email over to support@fasttravelgames.com and we can help you out there :-)

reviews.review_description: Cool graphics and narration. My rating might go up as you unlock more abilities and completing it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to post a review! Hope you manage to get a 100% completion rate:-)

reviews.review_description:
I really wish people were honest in their reviews. I bought this based on them. I have two major problems with this game:

1. It is not scary at all.  I am 20% into the game and find nothing scary about it. Even when I encountered the first enemy, it sparked nothing.  Nice visuals but not creepy enough for my taste.  I often get bored and quit the game.

2.  People claim this to be the nicest looking game on oculus but as I explore the mansion, it feels unfinished. There are empty shelves and empty rooms. I would expect a lot more interesting things to help me feel immersed, but the rooms are almost all bare.

Gave it a 2 because it does look nice but needs more to make me feel immersed and interested.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for posting a review! While start of the game does put you in a false sense of comfort, things get more intense and varied the more you play. As you progress you also gain access to an inventory system with different items and as well as unlock different Wraith powers that allows you to move through walls, lift heavy objects from a distance and more.

We really recommend for you to play the game through and see if you still feel the same way:-)

reviews.review_description: What a fantastic game! You can see the blood, sweat, and tears put into this game. Amazing graphics and a story thats so good! This is the game I hoped it would be! Great job guys!!

developer_response.body: Wow this review means a lot to us Mike! Thanks so much for taking the time to leave it Over the moon you're loving the game so far!

reviews.review_description:
So, I don't know why I bought this game, but the reviews made me do it. It's my first horror game on Oculus, and I think I completed aroud 10% of Game 1 after almost 2 hours. 
I am not a fan of jumpscare games, or maybe I am, but I don't know because I haven't tried them. When I read that this game doesn't do jumpscares, I was convinced. I don't know what I was thinking, like because there weren't any jumpscare I wouldn't be scared lmao.
Just when you enter the game, chills on my body. Music is unsettling and I know that somewhere there are bad guys that can get to me, even though I am already dead. Controls are easy to understand for now, but I am curious to see in a moment of action if it's gonna be natural or not. I have yet to encounter one.
For now, it's true, no intentional jumpscare. But man, I am under so much tension that even just the flashbacks to the past are making me jump when they appear. Also, I am not gonna spoil anything, but that first spectrum scared me so bad, just because I didn't see it coming. The fact that I cannot defend myself and I can only hide is making me want to run away, but if I get through this game, I will be so proud of myself, because being defenseless is a true fear in itself. 
I am a rookie in VR, so I don't know if my review is helpful at all, but I know there are other people that are scared easily like me and wonders if they should buy this. My answer: yes, do it. Only because it is out of your confort zone and that the story is meaningful. I have to push myself to play this and I like it.
Excited to see the rest!!

developer_response.body: Amazing to get this feedback from someone new to VR horror games, we are absolutely thrilled to hear how much you like it! Thanks for sharing!

reviews.review_description: Loving this game. Just can't get enough. Actually jumped a few times which is pretty rare for me.  Graphics are dope and gameplay super fun.  Whoever thought this one up has some imagination!

developer_response.body: Thanks a bunch for taking the time to leave a  review! We're over the moon to hear how much you enjoyed it! :-)

reviews.review_description: This game is ao scary  😨  it's so  cool to Play I like story to the game its a cool game I like the story  line of it nice jumps scares  😱 😨  I love it

developer_response.body: Hey jenpratt1982, we're so happy to hear you're enjoying your stay at the Barclay Mansion! Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: I like slow pace game to relax myself, so I want to just shoot zombies for 20 minutes don’t buy this game. To just relax after a long day work, this game is a brilliant choice!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for taking the time to leave a review! 😀 It means a lot to us to hear how much you're enjoying playing! We're not too sure you will feel as relaxed when you meet some of the sinister Spectres 👻. The game is intentionally designed to be slower paced in the beginning to allow the player to learn some of the backstory & game mechanics.

reviews.review_title: Made my pets even scared of me
reviews.review_description: My 2 dogs and my cat got scared of me rather than me getting scared of the game itself. The game play is 10/10 and a chef’s kiss. I haven’t gotten passed the part where you see a guy sitting on a chair and i got passed the library scene but it even made me feel like i was in the game. I love you game devs for making this game.

developer_response.body: This review is a 10/10 chef's kiss 😘👌. Thanks so much for taking the time to leave it. The game will get scarier the further you progress so be prepared 👀...

reviews.review_description: This game is garbage I want my money back

developer_response.body: Sad to hear you feel this way. We'd love to hear more about why you think this, please feel free to send us an email to support@fasttravelgames.com

reviews.review_description: As a beginner this game is perfect, really enjoying it

developer_response.body: Hey suzie197, thank you very much for taking the time to leave this lovely review and 4 stars!

reviews.review_description:
I haven't the game, but now that I'm actually getting into the action scenes, it's definitely better than what I thought. I use the word action lightly. More like, hide, run for your life. Adrenaline pumping, heart racing, my mind going crazy trying to sneak around.. without giving spoilers its definitely an immersive experience, definitely scary, and worth the money. 

My only real gripe is that it makes you constantly back track so it almost feels like you're not getting anywhere and I have a really hard time with that, with my adhd. I have to constantly be finding new things and doing new things to not get bored. Which is why I said, it's better than I thought. 

Few glitches, but nothing awful. And the graphics are actually phenomenal.  Makes you feel like you're really there. If I remember I'll have to come back with an update once I finish the game! Let me just get past this specific thing first. 😬😂 

Overall, awesome game. If you're down to get scared, and looking for a new game, definitely worth trying!
